arts.ttl: Roy Keane fires Newcastle star Anthony Gordon blunt three-word instruction amid England worry
arts.sum: Ex-Manchester United captain Roy Keane gave a blunt response when asked if Newcastle United star Anthony Gordon should be one of England's starting wingers. Gordon scored 11 goals and set up a further 10 for his Newcastle teammates as Eddie Howe's side narrowly missed out on European football, last season.

arts.ttl: The 14 players who could miss Newcastle United's vital Premier League clash at Leicester City
arts.sum: Isak isn't the only injury doubt for tonight's game, with Howe getting updates on Kieran Trippier, Anthony Gordon and Joelinton before naming his side. United are firm favourites against Ruud van Nistelrooy's relegation-threatened side, but Howe will be hoping Isak has shaken off the effects of a groin issue he felt in the 2-1 victory over Brentford last week.

arts.ttl: Harvey Barnes to get licence to earn permanent place in Newcastle United XI
arts.sum: Newcastle United's £38million man Harvey Barnes is preparing to take on his old club Leicester City tonight - knowing another good show in black and white could inflict a lethal blow on the Foxes survival hopes. Newcastle boss Howe said: "I'm sure the Leicester game will mean a lot to Harvey.

arts.ttl: Marc Guehi makes himself clear amid Alan Shearer's Newcastle United transfer claim
arts.sum: However, Newcastle ultimately stopped formally bidding in the final weeks of the window after Crystal Palace's demands for'superstar money' went beyond the club's limits and beyond what the Magpies felt they should pay given Guehi's contract situation. Marc Guehi has insisted he is just 'focused' on playing for Crystal Palace as the England international approaches the final year of his contract.

arts.ttl: Liverpool find Alexander Isak transfer alternative and £40m price for Newcastle-linked star
arts.sum: Harvey Elliott is a name that has been linked with Newcastle several times in recent weeks, with the Liverpool youngster tipped to leave Anfield this summer. The 22-year-old has already played 141 times for Liverpool since breaking into the first-team squad, but has made just 12 Premier League apprearances under Slot.

arts.ttl: £50m concern, character test passed - Bryan Mbeumo Newcastle transfer verdict
arts.sum: On one hand, there is a real advantage to Newcastle United going after a proven Premier League operator like Bryan Mbeumo; on the other, the Magpies could target an even younger, slightly cheaper option on the continent, such as PSV star Johan Bakayoko. United have again been linked with a series of attacking right-sided forwards ahead of the summer transfer window, with Mbeumo a proven Premier League performer.

arts.ttl: Monday’s briefing: Newcastle look to take advantage of City and Chelsea drawing
arts.sum: The Magpies are three points off fourth-placed Chelsea.

arts.ttl: Leicester vs Newcastle: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Previewing Leicester vs Newcastle in the Premier League on Monday, including team news, predictions and how to watch on TV.

arts.ttl: Patient Harvey Barnes an example to Newcastle squad, says Eddie Howe
arts.sum: Forward’s appearances limited by Anthony Gordon Barnes could face former team Leicester on Monday Newcastle’s head coach, Eddie Howe, has told his players to use Harvey Barnes’s patience as an example as the winger prepares to return to his former club Leicester for the first time. The 27-year-old left the King Power Stadium in a £38m switch to Tyneside in July 2023 after the Foxes’ relegation from the top flight, but has had to remain patient since as he vies with Anthony Gordon for a place on the left side of Howe’s front three. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Newcastle make contact with Kean - Monday's gossip
arts.sum: The representatives of Fiorentina striker Moise Kean approach Newcastle, Arsenal prepare to pay full amount for Espanyol goalkeeper Joan Garcia, while Everton contact agent of Freiburg's Merlin Rohl.
